name: Proxy Exploration and Reusable Guidance: A Modular LLM Post-Training Paradigm via Proxy-Guided Update Signals

description: arXiv:2607.11505v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Post-training is essential for refining the domain-specific capabilities of large language models (LLMs), yet existing reward optimization and distribution matching methods tightly couple policy exploration with distribution alignment. This coupling forces expensive exploration directly on the policy model and severely hinders the asynchronous g...
author: Daocheng Fu, Rong Wu, Yu Yang, Xuemeng Yang, Jianbiao Mei, Licheng Wen, Pinlong Cai, Yong Liu, Botian Shi, Yu Qiao
